skill: Ratios, rates, proportional relationships, and units
stem: In a scale model of a museum, a length of 1 inch is equivalent to a length of 23/4 feet in the actual museum. If a length in the actual museum measures y feet, which expression represents the corresponding length, in inches, in the model in terms of y?
rationale: Since 1 inch in the model = 23/4 feet in the actual museum, the conversion factor is (1 inch)/(23/4 feet) = 4/23 inches per foot. So y feet corresponds to y × (4/23) = 4y/23 inches in the model. Choice (b) is correct.
